products.name: StratumFlow
products.description: Visual workflow builder for business processes. Drag-and-drop automation with conditional logic, 200+ pre-built connectors.

products.name: StratumConnect
products.description: API gateway for custom integrations. Webhook management, event routing, OAuth2 provider for third-party apps.
products.availability: Included with Professional and Enterprise plans

products.name: StratumAnalytics
products.description: Real-time dashboards for workflow metrics. Custom report builder, SLA tracking, compliance reporting.

faq.a: Visit stratum.example.com/signup. Free 14-day trial on all plans, no credit card required.
Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest 2 versions). Mobile browsers supported for dashboard viewing.
99.9% for Professional, 99.99% for Enterprise. Status page: status.stratum.example.com
No free plan, but all paid plans include a 14-day free trial.

faq.q: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
faq.a: Yes, 25% discount on all plans for verified 501(c)(3) organizations. Contact sales@stratum.example.com.
200+ connectors including Salesforce, Jira, Slack, HubSpot, Zendesk, Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, AWS, and more.
SOC2 Type II compliance is included with Enterprise plans. Audit reports available on request.
